body.docName: 适用用户差标政策查询
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/policy/getTravelPolicies 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/policy/getTravelPolicies 
 ## 接口描述 
根据用户和表单信息查询当前表单下的差标政策 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"aplId","required":true,"label":"%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E4%BA%BAID","exampleValue":"U0000","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"eventSeqIds","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"expSeqIds","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[]}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","exampleValue":"XFT00001","label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","maxLength":"8","name":"OPAUID"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E5%B7%AE%E6%A0%87%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"travelPolicySeqId","required":false,"label":"%E6%94%BF%E7%AD%96%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"6063","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"DOUBLE","name":"comId","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8ID","exampleValue":"0","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"plcNam","required":false,"label":"%E6%94%BF%E7%AD%96%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%BB%9A%E5%8A%A8%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95%E6%94%BF%E7%AD%96","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"billSeqIdList","required":false,"label":"%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EId","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"expSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EId","exampleValue":"19218","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"expNam","required":false,"label":"%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"null","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"useTyp","required":false,"label":"%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%20*%20%200-%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%20%0A*%201-%E8%A1%A5%E8%B4%B4"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"citySts","required":false,"label":"%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E7%BA%A7%E5%88%AB%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EId","exampleValue":"Y","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"forecTyp","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%BC%BA%E5%BA%A6%20","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%20*%201-%E8%AD%A6%E7%A4%BA%E6%8F%90%E9%86%92%20%0A*%202-%E4%B8%8D%E5%BE%97%E6%8F%90%E4%BA%A4"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"plcCfg","required":false,"label":"%E6%94%BF%E7%AD%96%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0%20JSON%E5%AD%97%E7%AC%A6%E4%B8%B2","exampleValue":"%7B%22txt%22%3A%20%22%E5%8F%AF%E4%BB%A5%E4%BD%8F%E5%AE%BF500%E5%85%83%20%2F%20%E9%97%B4%E5%A4%9C%EF%BC%88%20%E5%90%AB%EF%BC%89%20%E4%BB%A5%E4%B8%8B%E7%9A%84%E9%85%92%E5%BA%97%22%2C%22fee%22%3A%22500%22%7D","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"plcTyp","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E6%94%BF%E7%AD%96%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"001","desc":"%20*%20%22000%22%20%20%22%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%94%BF%E7%AD%96%22%0A*%20%22001%22%20%20%22%E4%BD%8F%E5%AE%BF%E6%94%BF%E7%AD%96%22%0A*%20%22003%22%20%20%22%E6%9C%BA%E7%A5%A8%E6%94%BF%E7%AD%96%22%0A*%20%22004%22%20%20%22%E5%85%B6%E4%BB%96%E6%94%BF%E7%AD%96%EF%BC%88%E6%8C%89%E6%AC%A1%EF%BC%89%22%20%0A*%20%22005%22%20%20%22%E8%BD%AE%E8%88%B9%E6%94%BF%E7%AD%96%22%20%0A*%20%22006%22%20%20%22%E7%81%AB%E8%BD%A6%E6%94%BF%E7%AD%96%22%20%0A*%20%22007%22%20%20%22%E5%85%B6%E4%BB%96%E6%94%BF%E7%AD%96%EF%BC%88%E6%8C%89%E5%A4%A9%EF%BC%89%22%20%0A*%20%22008%22%20%20%22%E7%94%A8%E9%A4%90%E6%94%BF%E7%AD%96%22%20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"ssdMny","required":false,"label":"%E8%A1%A5%E8%B4%B4%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D","exampleValue":"null","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"ssdCclTyp","required":false,"label":"%E8%A1%A5%E8%B4%B4%E6%96%B9%E5%BC%8F","exampleValue":"null","desc":"%20*%20%E6%AC%A1-%221%22%0A*%20%E5%8D%8A%E5%A4%A9-%20%222%22%0A*%20%E5%85%A8%E5%A4%A9-%20%223%22%0A*%20%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89-%22C%22%0A*%20%E9%87%8C%E7%A8%8B%E8%A1%A5%E8%B4%B4-%22L%22%0A*%20%E6%97%B6%E9%95%BF-%22R%22%0A*%20%E6%97%B6%E5%88%BB-%22M%22"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"autoCheckFlg","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E5%8B%BE%E9%80%89","exampleValue":"null","desc":"%20*%20Y%20-%20%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E5%8B%BE%E9%80%89%20%20%0A*%20N-%20%E4%B8%8D%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E5%8B%BE%E9%80%89"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"plcGroupSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E7%BB%91%E5%AE%9A%E7%9A%84%E5%B7%AE%E6%A0%87%E7%AD%89%E7%BA%A7%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EId","exampleValue":"18547","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"maxTimesConfigState","required":false,"label":"%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A7%E6%AC%A1%E6%95%B0%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE%E5%BC%80%E5%85%B3","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%20*%20%220%22%20%E5%85%B3%0A*%20%E2%80%9C1%E2%80%9D%20%E5%BC%80"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"maxTimes","required":false,"label":"%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A7%E6%AC%A1%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"1","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"awardType","required":false,"label":"%E5%A5%96%E5%8A%B1%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%20*%201-%E5%B7%AE%E9%A2%9D%E5%A5%96%E5%8A%B1%20%20%0A*%202-%E6%8A%98%E6%89%A3%E5%A5%96%E5%8A%B1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"awardCheckFlg","required":false,"label":"%E5%A5%96%E5%8A%B1%E5%8B%BE%E9%80%89%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"false","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"awardRatio","required":false,"label":"%E5%A5%96%E5%8A%B1%E6%AF%94%E4%BE%8B","exampleValue":"null","desc":""}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97%E4%BD%8D","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ###请求示例
```json
{BaseURL}/api/itrip-gateway/v1/policy/getTravelPolicies?OPAUID=XFT00001
{
	"aplId": "U0000",
	"eventSeqIds":[6444],
	"expSeqIds": [19218]
}
```
###返回示例
```json
{
    "data": [
        {
            "travelPolicySeqId": 6063,
            "comId": 0,
            "plcNam": "滚动预算测试政策",
            "billSeqIdList": [
                6444
            ],
            "expSeqId": 19218,
            "expNam": null,
            "useTyp": "0",
            "citySts": "Y",
            "forecTyp": "1",
            "plcCfg": "{\"txt\": \"可以住宿500元 / 间夜（ 含） 以下的酒店\",\"fee\":\"500\"}",
            "plcTyp": "001",
            "ssdMny": null,
            "ssdCclTyp": null,
            "autoCheckFlg": null,
            "plcGroupSeqId": 18547,
            "maxTimesConfigState": "0",
            "maxTimes": 1,
            "awardType": "1",
            "awardCheckFlg": false,
            "awardRatio": null
        }
    ],
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| **错误码** | **错误描述**        | **备注**                       |
|------------|------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| 400      | 请联系管理员配置企业信息 | 无                            |
| ERR0000      | 解密失败 | 无                            |
| 400      | 对应的员工信息不存在 | 无                            |

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"aplId","required":true,"label":"%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E4%BA%BAID","exampleValue":"U0000","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"eventSeqIds","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"expSeqIds","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[]}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","exampleValue":"XFT00001","label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","maxLength":"8","name":"OPAUID"}}]}]}
